title: Racosperma resinistipuleum
taxonomy: Racosperma resinistipuleum is a plant species that is classified within the family Fabaceae. This family includes a wide range of plants commonly known as legumes, which are characterized by their fruit pods and ability to fix nitrogen in the soil. The genus Racosperma is a synonym for the genus Acacia, which is a large and diverse group of plants native to Australia. The classification of Racosperma resinistipuleum is subject to ongoing research and revision, but it is generally accepted as a member of the Acacia genus.
